{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Nightstone Spear Formation
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Nightstone Spear Formation]] involves nine flying tridents.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
